mapper.select: SELECT `入库危废明细编号` AS itemId, `入库单编号` AS warehousingId, `收运通知单明细编号` AS pickupNoticeItemId, `危废条目编号` AS hazardousWasteItemId, `废物名称` AS wasteName, `废物代码` AS wasteCode, `危险特性` AS hazardFeature, `废物形态` AS form, `计划收运数量` AS plannedQty, `基本计量单位` AS measureUnit, `是否启用辅助核算` AS enableAuxiliaryAccounting, `辅助计量单位` AS auxUnit, `辅助单位每基础单位数量` AS auxPerBase, `辅助数量` AS auxQuantity, `实际收运辅助数量` AS actualAuxQuantity, `实际收运数量` AS actualQty, `差异原因` AS differenceReason, `有价类重量` AS valuableWeight, `无价类重量` AS valuelessWeight, `实际入库日期` AS createTime, `更新时间` AS updateTime FROM WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM WHERE `入库单编号` = #{warehousingId} ORDER BY `入库危废明细编号`
